function getStatus() view returns (uint8 currentState, bool buyerOk, bool sellerOk, bool usdtIn, bool tokenIn, uint64 fundingDeadline)

function terms() view returns (address buyer, address seller, address usdt, address tradeToken, uint256 usdtAmount, uint256 tokenAmount, uint64 fundingDeadline, uint16 feeBps, address feeRecipient, bytes32 termsHash)
event Settled(address indexed buyer, address indexed seller, uint256 fee)
